title: dennstaedtia novae-zelandiae
intro: Dennstaedtia novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Dennstaedtia novae-zelandiae are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
